title: Scientific Explanation
scenario: Explain the concept of photosynthesis to a 10-year-old. Write a clear and concise explanation that includes the following key points: the inputs (water, sunlight, CO2), the process (enzymes, chlorophyll), and the outputs (glucose, oxygen). Limit your explanation to 150 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the explanation clear and easy to understand?
Is the explanation accurate and true to the scientific concept?
Is the tone of the explanation engaging and suitable for a 10-year-old?
Are there any grammatical or spelling errors in the explanation?
